cohorts.name: Factory proof cohort
cohorts.decision_reason: These repos prove the factory across control-plane, runtime, commerce, templates, and subsystem surfaces, but they do not share one atomic release or deployment lifecycle.

cohorts.name: App family rollout
cohorts.decision_reason: These repos should share the same app adoption contract while retaining separate product ownership.
cohorts.adoption_target: app contract: AGENTS pointer, Justfile, just ci, CI calling Just, security evidence or accepted risk, Linear label

cohorts.name: Bedrock consolidation transition
cohorts.decision_reason: These repos are already moving into bedrock-consolidated, so deep adoption should target the consolidated repo instead of pre-consolidation repos.
cohorts.adoption_target: full Tier-1 adoption targets bedrock-consolidated; pre-consolidation repos keep compatibility pointers only

cohorts.name: Docs and collateral governance
cohorts.decision_reason: Storytelling, business plans, masterplan, and similar material should be governed as knowledge collateral, not treated as code services.
cohorts.adoption_target: document contract: owner, freshness, source-of-truth links, Build-Depot policy pointer, optional docs checks
